creator: freebsd@moosefs.com
text:
Created attachment 155418
Ports for MooseFS CGI Scripts 2.0.61-1

The new port sysutils/moosefs-cgi: MooseFS CGI Scripts version 2.0.61-1. 

We created totally new (and official) ports and we want to become the ports maintainer.

In attachment is a tarball containing ports tree for MooseFS CGI Scripts.
